---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement for Satori
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What workflow is blocked or unnecessarily hard?

## Proposed Behavior

What should Satori do differently?

## Boundary

Which package or surface should own this?

- [ ] `packages/core`
- [ ] `packages/mcp`
- [ ] `packages/cli`
- [ ] docs / launch site
- [ ] not sure

## Contract Impact

Does this change a public MCP tool, schema, warning, status, install config, or package behavior?

## Alternatives Considered

What simpler workaround or smaller change did you consider?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, logs, tool payloads, or links. Do not include secrets, provider tokens, or private repository content.
